description: Grande ville du nord de l'Angleterre à forte communauté musulmane, Manchester offre le 'Curry Mile' halal et de nombreuses mosquées.

description_en: Manchester, in the United Kingdom, is a halal-friendly destination with a Halal Trust Score of 4.4/5. Muslim travelers will find 150 halal restaurants listed, 1 mosques, real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — a complete guide to travel with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Manchester: 150 halal restaurants listed, 1 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 4.4/5.
